stemHtml: Considering the airflow around a positively cambered aerofoil that is producing lift, the point of minimum static pressure is found...

options.a: On the leading edge of the wing.
options.b: Slightly above the wing, where the airflow is fastest.
options.c: Below the wing, where dynamic pressure is lowest.
options.d: Slightly behind the leading edge, on the upper surface of the wing.
